title: Old Loading Progress Bar
description: Brings back the old world loading progress bar to Modern Minecraft.
body:
# Old World Loading Progress Bar Mod

Fabric only at the moment!

## Overview

Bring back the nostalgic experience of the old world loading progress bar to your modern Minecraft! This mod is perfect for players who miss the classic loading screen and want to add a touch of retro to their game.

## Compatibility

- **Supported Minecraft Versions**: 1.20 and upwards.
- **Might conflict with mods that modify the world loading screen, any issues please report here [https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar/issues](https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar/issues)**


## Installation

1. **Download**: Get the mod from [Modrinth releases]([https://modrinth.com/mod/old-loading-progress-bar/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/old-loading-progress-bar/versions)) or the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar).
2. **Install**: Drop it in your mods folder, you're good to go!

## Issues and Feedback

- **Report Issues**: If you encounter any problems or have suggestions, please submit them on the [GitHub Issues page](https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar/issues).

## Links

- **GitHub Repository**: [https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar](https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar)
- **Issues and Feedback**: [https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar/issues](https://github.com/fokshadev/loading-bar/issues)

---
